response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals and proven ability to architect complex distributed systems at Staff level, the role requires deep expertise in Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem—none of which are evident in the resume. His recent career trajectory (last 5 years across TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, AI agents) has moved away from JVM tooling. The only IDE experience mentioned (NI LabWindows in 2014-2015) is dated and unrelated to enterprise frameworks. For a mid-senior individual contributor role focused on enterprise IDE tooling, the domain misalignment is substantial despite undeniable engineering capability.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with proven track record scaling complex distributed systems (Dunnhumby's millions of requests/sec microservices infrastructure)
Demonstrates software craftsmanship fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and clean architecture across multiple senior roles
Strong open-source contributor and technical educator, showing communication and architectural design thinking
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in Java or Kotlin; Java appears only as secondary skill in passing mentions from 2016
No experience with Spring ecosystem, Hibernate, build tools (Maven/Gradle), or enterprise framework integration
Recent 5-year career focus on TypeScript/Node.js/cloud infrastructure shows movement away from JVM and IDE/language tooling domains

key_factors.factor: No recent IDE or language tooling experience
Strong engineering fundamentals and seniority level
